notes: v0.22.0: Future Standard - announced sets with no spoiled cards yet (Nauctis: The Sunken Realm, Kamigawa: Titanbreach, Zhalfir, plus the 2027 Universes Beyond slots) on the Sets page, each linked to its official announcement. Card watch - Ctrl+K anywhere to see every meta deck playing a card, with copies and board. Matchup Lab - opponent tags and notes save as you type.
